comment: In-repo voice catalog for the local ONNX voice stack (ADR 0033). Each voice resolves to a pinned .ort model + .onnx.json config hosted by the fono-voice mirror as release assets tagged by ONNX Runtime ABI (release_tag). SHA-256s are verified on download; the base URL is overridable. Keep this in sync with bogdanr/fono-voice manifest.json. The default engine policy is Kokoro for English, Piper for every other language.
